data.content:
### POST /v1/account_sessions

Source: https://docs.stripe.com/baas/start-integration/integration-guides/embedded-finance

Creates an Account Session for a connected account, enabling the financial account component and optionally specifying its features like sending money or transferring balance.

```APIDOC
## POST /v1/account_sessions

### Description
Creates an Account Session for a connected account. This endpoint allows you to enable and configure the financial account component, including specific features like 'send_money', 'transfer_balance', and 'external_account_collection'.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/v1/account_sessions

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
_None_

#### Query Parameters
_None_

#### Request Body
- **account** (string) - Required - The ID of the connected account for which to create the session.
- **components** (object) - Required - A hash of settings for the various components.
  - **financial_account** (object) - Required - Configuration for the financial account component.
    - **enabled** (boolean) - Required - Set to `true` to enable the financial account component.
    - **features** (object) - Optional - A hash of features to enable or disable for the financial account component.
      - **send_money** (boolean) - Optional - If `true`, enables the ability to send money via the financial account.
      - **transfer_balance** (boolean) - Optional - If `true`, enables the ability to transfer balance to/from the financial account.
      - **external_account_collection** (boolean) - Optional - If `true`, enables the ability for external account collection.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "account": "{{CONNECTEDACCOUNT_ID}}",
  "components": {
    "financial_account": {
      "enabled": true,
      "features": {
        "send_money": true,
        "transfer_balance": true,
        "external_account_collection": true
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
A successfully created AccountSession object.
- **id** (string) - Unique identifier for the object.
- **object** (string) - Value is "account_session".
- **account** (string) - The connected account ID for which the session was created.
- **client_secret** (string) - The client secret of this AccountSession. Used for authentication on the client side.
- **components** (object) - Configuration for the components enabled in this session.
  - **financial_account** (object) - Configuration for the financial account component.
    - **enabled** (boolean) - Whether the financial account component is enabled.
    - **features** (object) - Features enabled for the financial account component.
      - **send_money** (boolean) - Whether the send money feature is enabled.
      - **transfer_balance** (boolean) - Whether the transfer balance feature is enabled.
      - **external_account_collection** (boolean) - Whether the external account collection feature is enabled.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "id": "acs_12345",
  "object": "account_session",
  "account": "acct_12345",
  "client_secret": "acs_12345_secret_abcDEF",
  "components": {
    "financial_account": {
      "enabled": true,
      "features": {
        "send_money": true,
        "transfer_balance": true,
        "external_account_collection": true
      }
    }
  }
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### POST /v1/account_sessions

Source: https://docs.stripe.com/connect/build-full-embedded-integration

Creates an Account Session to enable the account management embedded component for a connected account. This allows the connected account to update their settings or profile.

```APIDOC
## POST /v1/account_sessions

### Description
Creates an Account Session for a connected account, enabling the account management embedded component. This allows the connected account to update their settings and profile directly on your website.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/v1/account_sessions

### Parameters
#### Request Body
- **account** (string) - Required - The ID of the connected account for which to create an Account Session.
- **components[account_management][enabled]** (boolean) - Required - Specifies whether the account management component is enabled. Set to `true`.
- **components[account_management][features][external_account_collection]** (boolean) - Optional - Specifies whether the external account collection feature is enabled within the account management component. Set to `true` to enable.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "account": "{{CONNECTEDACCOUNT_ID}}",
  "components": {
    "account_management": {
      "enabled": true,
      "features": {
        "external_account_collection": true
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **id** (string) - The unique identifier for the Account Session.
- **object** (string) - Value is `account_session`.
- **client_secret** (string) - The client secret for the Account Session. This must be securely passed to the frontend to initialize the embedded component.
- **account** (string) - The ID of the connected account.
- **expires_at** (integer) - The Unix timestamp at which the Account Session will expire.
- **livemode** (boolean) - Whether the Account Session was created in live mode.
- **components** (object) - Configuration for enabled components.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "id": "acs_123example",
  "object": "account_session",
  "client_secret": "sk_test_...",
  "account": "{{CONNECTEDACCOUNT_ID}}",
  "expires_at": 1678886400,
  "livemode": false,
  "components": {
    "account_management": {
      "enabled": true,
      "features": {
        "external_account_collection": true
      }
    }
  }
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### POST /v1/account_sessions

Source: https://docs.stripe.com/connect/build-full-embedded-integration

Creates an Account Session to enable account management, specifically for account onboarding via Stripe's embedded components. This session links to a connected account and specifies which embedded components are enabled.

```APIDOC
## POST /v1/account_sessions

### Description
Creates an Account Session to enable account management, specifically for account onboarding via Stripe's embedded components. This session links to a connected account and specifies which embedded components are enabled.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/v1/account_sessions

### Parameters
#### Request Body
- **account** (string) - Required - The ID of the connected account for which to create the session.
- **components[account_onboarding][enabled]** (boolean) - Required - Specifies whether the account onboarding embedded component is enabled for this session.
- **components[account_onboarding][features][external_account_collection]** (boolean) - Optional - If `account_onboarding` is enabled, setting this to `true` enables the external account collection feature.

### Request Example
{
  "account": "{{CONNECTEDACCOUNT_ID}}",
  "components": {
    "account_onboarding": {
      "enabled": true,
      "features": {
        "external_account_collection": true
      }
    }
  }
}

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **id** (string) - A unique identifier for the Account Session.
- **object** (string) - The type of the object, which is always "account_session".
- **client_secret** (string) - The client secret for the Account Session, used to initialize the embedded component.

#### Response Example
{
  "id": "acs_1234567890abcdefghijklmnop",
  "object": "account_session",
  "client_secret": "sk_test_client_secret_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"
}
```

--------------------------------

### POST /v1/account_links

Source: https://docs.stripe.com/baas/start-integration/integration-guides/embedded-finance

Creates an account link that your connected account can use to onboard to your platform. The link provides a URL where the connected account can complete required steps, such as identity verification or business information collection.

```APIDOC
## POST /v1/account_links

### Description
This endpoint creates a unique URL for a connected account to complete their onboarding process on the Stripe platform. It is designed to be securely distributed to your connected accounts from within your application.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
`/v1/account_links`

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
_None_

#### Query Parameters
_None_

#### Request Body
- **account** (string) - Required - The ID of the connected account for which the account link is being created. Example: `acct_12345`
- **refresh_url** (string) - Required - The URL to which Stripe should redirect the user when their session expires or is invalidated. This URL should handle re-creating the account link and redirecting the user.
- **return_url** (string) - Required - The URL to which Stripe should redirect the user when they have completed the account onboarding flow. This URL should indicate the success or failure of the onboarding process.
- **type** (string) - Required - The type of account link. For onboarding, this should be set to `account_onboarding`.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "account": "{{CONNECTED_ACCOUNT_ID}}",
  "refresh_url": "https://example.com/reauth",
  "return_url": "https://example.com/return",
  "type": "account_onboarding"
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **object** (string) - The type of the object returned. Value is `account_link`.
- **created** (integer) - The timestamp (Unix epoch time) when the account link was created.
- **expires_at** (integer) - The timestamp (Unix epoch time) when the account link expires. The link should be used before this time.
- **url** (string) - The URL that your connected account should be directed to in order to continue the onboarding process.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "object": "account_link",
  "created": 1612927106,
  "expires_at": 1612927406,
  "url": "https://connect.stripe.com/setup/s/5n_e8jBw0d"
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### POST /v1/accounts

Source: https://docs.stripe.com/connect/build-full-embedded-integration

Creates a new connected account configured for a fully embedded integration. In this setup, Stripe manages risk and pricing, and connected accounts interact with Stripe functionality exclusively through your platform's user interface, without direct access to the Stripe Dashboard.

```APIDOC
## POST /v1/accounts

### Description
Creates an account where Stripe manages risk, controls pricing, and assumes responsibility for account onboarding requirements. Your platform uses embedded components and isn’t liable for negative balances. Your connected accounts don’t have access to Stripe-hosted dashboards.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/v1/accounts

### Parameters
#### Request Body
- **country** (string) - Required - The country of the account to be created (e.g., `US`).
- **controller[stripe_dashboard][type]** (string) - Required - Specifies that the connected account will not have access to the Stripe Dashboard. Must be set to `none`.
- **capabilities[card_payments][requested]** (boolean) - Required - Requests the `card_payments` capability for the account. Must be set to `true`.
- **capabilities[transfers][requested]** (boolean) - Required - Requests the `transfers` capability for the account. Must be set to `true`.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "country": "US",
  "controller": {
    "stripe_dashboard": {
      "type": "none"
    }
  },
  "capabilities": {
    "card_payments": {
      "requested": true
    },
    "transfers": {
      "requested": true
    }
  }
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **id** (string) - A unique identifier for the created account.
- **object** (string) - Always `account` for account objects.
- **country** (string) - The country of the account.
- **type** (string) - The type of account (e.g., `express`).
- **controller** (object) - Information about the account's controller.
  - **stripe_dashboard** (object) - Details about Stripe Dashboard access.
    - **type** (string) - The access type, expected to be `none`.
- **capabilities** (object) - The status of the requested capabilities.
  - **card_payments** (object) - Status of the `card_payments` capability.
    - **requested** (boolean) - Whether the capability was requested.
    - **status** (string) - The current status of the capability (e.g., `active`, `inactive`, `pending`).
  - **transfers** (object) - Status of the `transfers` capability.
    - **requested** (boolean) - Whether the capability was requested.
    - **status** (string) - The current status of the capability.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "id": "acct_1234567890abcdef",
  "object": "account",
  "business_profile": null,
  "capabilities": {
    "card_payments": {
      "requested": true,
      "status": "active"
    },
    "transfers": {
      "requested": true,
      "status": "active"
    }
  },
  "country": "US",
  "controller": {
    "stripe_dashboard": {
      "type": "none"
    }
  },
  "created": 1678886400,
  "email": null,
  "payouts_enabled": true,
  "charges_enabled": true,
  "type": "express",
  "metadata": {}
}
```
```
